narrative:
Brecksville City has 9,798 registered voters, with 52.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.9%, a modest Republican lean of 5.6 percentage points.
